text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I ran my heart out today as well! My legs've
turned to jelly!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Rice! Where are you off to at such a late hour?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
B-Bakushin O! Well... I just thought... I'd go for a
little run...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I want... to do my best like everyone else...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm so-sorry! I'll hurry and be back before curfew!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! You're such a hard worker! And will you
look at your footwork!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wonderful! I'd expect nothing less of one of my
rivals! Even my jelly legs are itching with
excitement!
choice_data_list: Are you going to keep running?
Remember we have to train tomorrow too.
Remember we have to train tomorrow too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wonderful! I'd expect nothing less of one of my
rivals! Even my jelly legs are itching with
excitement!
choice_data_list: Are you going to keep running?
Remember we have to train tomorrow too.
Remember we have to train tomorrow too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What a great idea! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Sakura Bakushin O and I continue to
train until curfew.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Of course! And I'll be going full Bakushin
tomorrow too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she is more than pumped up for
tomorrow's training already.
